error_definitions.name: Insufficient Documentation
error_definitions.description: No documentation or insufficient amount of comments in the code

error_definitions.name: Sequence and Selection Error
error_definitions.description: Errors in the coding sequence, selection and looping including incorrect use of comparison operators

error_definitions.name: Output Impact Error
error_definitions.description: Errors that adversely impact the expected output, such as calculation errors or omissions

error_definitions.name: Syntax Error
error_definitions.description: There are syntax errors in the code

error_definitions.name: Naming Convention Violation
error_definitions.description: Naming conventions are not followed

error_definitions.name: Constants Error
error_definitions.description: Constants are not properly declared or used

error_definitions.name: Inefficient Code
error_definitions.description: The code is inefficient and can be optimized

error_definitions.name: Output Formatting Issues
error_definitions.description: There are issues with the expected code output formatting (spacing, decimal places, etc.)

error_definitions.name: Programming Style Issues
error_definitions.description: There are programming style issues that do not adhere to language standards (indentation, white space, etc.)

error_definitions.name: Scanner Class Error
error_definitions.description: There are errors related to the use of the Scanner class

error_definitions.name: Method Errors
error_definitions.description: Method errors in the code (passing the incorrect number of arguments, incorrect data types for arguments and parameter variables, or failing to include the data type of parameter variables in the method header)

error_definitions.description: The filename and class container are not the same

error_definitions.description: There are formatting issues not matching Sample Input and Output (i.e spacing, missing dollar sign, not using print/println appropriately, etc.)

error_definitions.name: Stale Data
error_definitions.description: There is stale data in classes

error_definitions.name: Unused Variables
error_definitions.description: There are variables/fields declared that are not used in the program

error_definitions.description: The program has the incorrect data type(s) used

error_definitions.description: No documentation or insufficient documentation (comments) in the code

error_definitions.name: Does Not Compile
error_definitions.description: Program does not compile

error_definitions.name: Major Formatting Issues
error_definitions.description: Major formatting issues – instructions are not followed for output (output and formatting must match sample output exactly)

error_definitions.name: Sequence and Selection Error
error_definitions.description: All errors when coding sequence, selection and/or looping control structures

error_definitions.name: Curly Braces Omitted
error_definitions.description: Omit curly braces where required

error_definitions.name: Input Validation Error
error_definitions.description: Failure to validate input or input validation is incorrect

error_definitions.name: Function / Prototype Error
error_definitions.description: Functions / Prototypes not declared and called correctly per the assignment instructions

error_definitions.name: Calculation Error
error_definitions.description: Calculation errors that produce incorrect results

error_definitions.name: Output Impact Error
error_definitions.description: Any errors that adversely impact the output

error_definitions.description: Filename and class container name are not the same

error_definitions.description: Incorrect filename (does not match assignment requirements)

error_definitions.name: Incorrect Data Type
error_definitions.description: Data type declaration is incorrect

error_definitions.name: Misspelling
error_definitions.description: Misspelling(s) in identifiers, output strings, or comments

error_definitions.name: Naming Convention Violation
error_definitions.description: Failing to follow naming conventions

error_definitions.name: Constants Error
error_definitions.description: Failing to declare and use named constants (if needed)

error_definitions.description: Inefficient code (code duplication; spaghetti code, etc.)

error_definitions.description: Minor formatting issues – decimal scale (incorrect decimal places or missing separators)

error_definitions.name: Programming Style Issues
error_definitions.description: Programming style issues (inconsistent or no indentation, inadequate white space, etc. – review sample programs in the book)
